title: Is backtesting important? I run a couple of backtesting engines with data 90days-2 years. Running my strategy on them. Bit sceptical
author: FantasticShine4012

comments.author: eggrally
comments.body: I had to buy 20 years of stock data,  1 min data,  if you have alot of money on the line, better do some more testing

replies.author: FantasticShine4012
replies.body: Thanks man i will check it out

replies.author: FantasticShine4012
replies.body: Would you guys pay for such data from a site?

replies.author: FantasticShine4012
replies.body: Massive.com is only options data i think

replies.author: eggrally
replies.body: there are cheaper sites, but this one has data back 26 years,  the backtesting has been good

comments.author: FantasticShine4012
comments.body: Question… would you guys pay for such data from a site???

comments.author: FantasticShine4012
comments.body: So there is a need for this data ??   But it is expensive

comments.author: FantasticShine4012
comments.body: Start backtesting. I found the perfect site with actual data finally
